STELLA FUGAZ · Storyboard Frames · GPT Image 2 619 frames · 1 por toma · imagen fija 21:9
·····························

Versión imagen para GPT Image 2: un prompt de cuadro fijo por toma (619 frames). No es video: cada uno describe un instante congelado. Cómo usarlo: adjunta en GPT Image 2 las láminas que indica «References to attach» (Image 1 = personaje, Image 2 = locación), pega el prompt y genera. Reutiliza la misma lámina de cada personaje en todos sus cuadros para consistencia, y realimenta el cuadro anterior como referencia para continuidad. Pulsa copiar.

ACTO 1 · SEC 1-9 · Erdia cae · 212 frames

1 — DESCENSO AL CORAZÓN MUERTO 12 frames

FRAME 1SEC 1 — Total blackimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachlocation only — Image 1 = "Erdia (planet from orbit)".
Framingextreme wide establishing shot, subject tiny in a vast environment, translated from "Gran plano general".
SubjectNo character in frame — Negro total. Nada. El vacío antes del mundo. Sostener la oscuridad.
Staging / backgrounda luminous living world wrapped in soft golden cloud, continents veined with rivers of light, oceans catching the dawn like molten glass, against the black of space.
Light & moodsoft cosmic dawn, warm gold rimming the world against black, cold star-light. Contemplative, reverent, awed. Still, quiet, held.
NoteNegro total. Nada. El vacío antes del mundo. Sostener la oscuridad.

References to attachImage 1 = "King Vorthan turnaround"; Image 2 = "Imperial soldier-robot reference"; Image 3 = "Naio's lab establishing".
Framinglow-angle wide shot looking up, subject towering overhead, translated from "Contrapicado".
SubjectVorthan, the King: tall, ageless, regal, a calm friendly smile that never reaches the eyes, ornate dark-and-gold imperial robes.; Imperial soldier robots: white-grey plating, faceless visor, bulky. Pose and expression frozen for this beat: Entra VORTHAN, el Rey. Alto, sereno, con una sonrisa de viejo amigo de la familia. Soldados-robot detrás, llenando el umbral como una sombra.
Staging / backgroundNaio's lab: cool, clean, hushed, pale curved organic-tech surfaces and floating holographic data, clinical blue-white light, the warm world shut outside. Key element: robot soldiers massed behind him in the doorway.
Light & moodcool clinical blue-white light, holograms glowing cold. Contemplative, reverent, awed. Still, quiet, held.
NoteEntra VORTHAN, el Rey. Alto, sereno, con una sonrisa de viejo amigo de la familia. Soldados-robot detrás, llenando el umbral como una sombra.

5 — SALA DEL ORBE / MUERTE DE VERA 38 frames

FRAME 99SEC 5 — The Orb revealedimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachlocation only — Image 1 = "Orb chamber establishing".
Framingextreme wide establishing shot, subject tiny in a vast environment, translated from "Gran plano general".
SubjectNo character in frame — Orbe — a suspended sphere of pure luzagua light, pulsing like a second heart
Staging / backgrounda cathedral-scale chamber of pale luminous stone dissolving into golden haze, concentric naiel arches veined with living luzagua, a polished obsidian-gold mirror floor, thin waterfalls of light down the columns, luminous pollen in god-rays.
Light & moodwarm sacred Orb-glow rippling across arches and the mirror floor. Contemplative, reverent, awed. Still, quiet, held.
NoteUna cámara inmensa. En el centro, suspendido, el ORBE: una esfera de luzagua pura, latiendo como un corazón segundo del mundo.

Staging / backgrounda golden naiel metropolis of warm honey-stone terraces and airy towers threaded by glowing luzagua canals, hanging gardens, sunlight pooling like syrup. Key element: radio, her steady face over static.
Light & moodbright warm morning, rippling gold luzagua reflections. Charged, emotional.
NoteLa radio, la voz firme sobre la estática. (Line delivered — convey the emotion, do NOT render the words as text: "No dejes que nadie consiga ese Orbe. Nadie.")

9 — BALCÓN REAL / DISCURSO 15 frames

FRAME 198SEC 9 — The plaza, the balconyimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachImage 1 = "King Vorthan turnaround"; Image 2 = "Palace plaza establishing".

ACTO 3 · SEC 21-29 · el regreso · 183 frames

21 — Puerto en ruinas 25 frames

FRAME 1SEC 21 Ruins — Grey Dawn Over Broken Erdiaimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachImage 1 = location only; Image 2 = @ErdiaRuinas establishing plate.
Framingextreme wide establishing, high crane angle over the city.
Subjectlocation only — no characters.
Staging / backgroundthe once-golden city sprawls fractured and split in two, ash drifting in dead-still air, imperial murals looming over rubble where gardens used to be.
Light & moodcold smoke-filtered grey dawn, the gold long dead; still/quiet/held, mournful.
Notethe decisive instant — a whole civilization frozen mid-ruin under motionless ash.
FRAME 2SEC 21 Ruins — Stella's Name Struck Outimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachImage 1 = location only; Image 2 = @ErdiaRuinas (defaced wall).
Framingtight insert / detail, flat frontal.
Subjectlocation only — a peeling mural of the King, below it one crossed-out name scrawled in angry paint (in-world defaced graffiti only, no rendered readable text as a title).
Staging / backgroundcracked wall, twenty years of scrawled hatred ringing the name, grey rubble beneath.
Light & moodgrey, harsh, flat; bitter, accusatory, held.
Notethe lie the King built, frozen on stone.
FRAME 3SEC 21 Ruins — Dead Luzagua Trickleimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachImage 1 = location only; Image 2 = @ErdiaRuinas.
Framingwide, low static.
Subjectlocation only.
Staging / backgrounda thread of opaque luzagua runs between the scrap, nearly dry, no shimmer left in it.
Light & moodgrey, lightless; contemplative, still/quiet/held.
Notethe light that once fed the world reduced to a dull dying trickle.
FRAME 4SEC 21 Ruins — The Small Ship Sets Downimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachImage 1 = location only; Image 2 = @ErdiaRuinas (scrap landing).
Framingwide, low angle at ground level.
Subjectlocation only — a small ship settled among the scrap, landing dust hanging then resettling around it.
Staging / backgroundship centered low in frame amid heaps of scrap, ruined skyline behind.
Light & moodgrey daylight; frozen at the instant the dust settles.
Notethe return begins — the ship at rest, dust caught mid-fall.
FRAME 5SEC 21 Ruins — The Team Steps Outimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachImage 1 = @StellaTeñida sheet (with @Brog, @Nima, @Noah); Image 2 = @ErdiaRuinas.
Framingfull shot, static.
Subject@Brog, @Nima (four arms), @Noah, and @StellaTeñida step from the open hatch — Stella ~19, dark-dyed hair, hood up, @TrajeNuevo, amber eyes, hardened; the group frozen mid-step onto the ground.
Staging / backgroundthe four grouped at the hatch, ruined city opening before them.
Light & moodgrey daylight; tense, held.
Noteshe steps into the ruined city she once called home.
FRAME 6SEC 21 Ruins — Her Own Ruined Worldimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachImage 1 = @StellaTeñida; Image 2 = @ErdiaRuinas.
Framingclose-up, static.
Subject@StellaTeñida under the hood, eyes scanning her destroyed world in silence — dark-dyed hair, amber eyes, jaw set, grief held behind a hardened face.
Staging / backgroundher face fills frame right, blurred ruins beyond.
Light & moodsoft grey on her face; still/quiet/held, silent.
Notethe instant she takes in what became of home.
FRAME 7SEC 21 Ruins — Through Hostile Staresimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachImage 1 = @StellaTeñida; Image 2 = @ErdiaRuinas (grey market street).
Framingmedium shot, static.
Subject@StellaTeñida moving through a grey crowd — dark-dyed hair, amber eyes, hood up; sunken hostile faces turning toward her with taught-in hatred.
Staging / backgroundher mid-frame, hollow-eyed townsfolk flanking a grey market street.
Light & moodgrey, hard faces; contemplative, held.
Noteshe walks under the hatred the King taught them.
FRAME 8SEC 21 Ruins — The Old Man Spitsimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachImage 1 = location only; Image 2 = @ErdiaRuinas.
Framingtight insert / detail, low.
Subjectan old man's spit landing in the dust at the sound of Stella's name — his weathered mouth frozen in a sneer above.
Staging / backgroundthe gob of spit caught in the grey dust, boots and rubble around.
Light & moodgrey, hard; frozen at peak instant.
Notecontempt made physical, caught the moment it hits the dust.
FRAME 9SEC 21 Ruins — "A Whole Planet Hates You"imagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachImage 1 = @Noah (with @StellaTeñida); Image 2 = @ErdiaRuinas.
Framingmedium two-shot, static.
Subject@Noah leans close to @StellaTeñida, voice lowered, glancing sidelong — Stella dark-dyed hair, amber eyes, hood up.
Staging / backgroundthe two tight together in a grey street, crowd blurred behind.
Light & moodgrey, intimate; the ache of his line "A whole planet hates you. And you still came back."
Notehis disbelief at her return, held mid-murmur (no rendered text).
FRAME 10SEC 21 Ruins — The Weight of Homeimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachImage 1 = @StellaTeñida; Image 2 = @ErdiaRuinas.
Framingclose-up, static.
Subject@StellaTeñida holding her gaze on the ruins, not yet answering — amber eyes, dark-dyed hair, the weight of being home in her stillness.
Staging / backgroundher face frame-left, broken city soft behind.
Light & moodgrey; still/quiet/held, silent.
Notethe breath before her answer.
FRAME 11SEC 21 Ruins — "That's Why I Came Back"imagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachImage 1 = @StellaTeñida; Image 2 = @ErdiaRuinas.
Framingclose-up, static.
Subject@StellaTeñida, eyes on the broken city, mouth just parting to speak low — amber eyes steady, dark-dyed hair, resolve settling into her face.
Staging / backgroundher close, ruins beyond.
Light & moodgrey; the quiet steel of "That's why I came back."
Noteresolve against the whole world, frozen on her face.
FRAME 12SEC 21 Ruins — The Resistance Surrounds Themimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.

Subjecta resistance group boxes in the team, light-weapons raised; at the front an older, tired @Korin — Stella's group hooded and tense.
Staging / backgroundthe circle of fighters closing, shadowed alley walls.
Light & moodgrey, shadowed; frozen at the standoff's peak.
Notethe ambush snapping shut around them.
FRAME 13SEC 21 Ruins — She Lowers the Hoodimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachImage 1 = @StellaTeñida (with @Korin); Image 2 = @ErdiaRuinas.
Framingshot / reverse-shot pairing, static.
Subject@Korin's weapon leveled at @StellaTeñida as she draws her hood back slowly, dark-dyed hair revealed — amber eyes, calm.
Staging / backgroundKorin foreground aiming, Stella facing him.
Light & moodgrey; held, tense.
Notethe reveal begins — hood down, hair showing.
FRAME 14SEC 21 Ruins — Finger on the Triggerimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachImage 1 = @Korin; Image 2 = @ErdiaRuinas.

Subject@Korin scrutinizing her face, not recognizing the dark hair, finger tight on the energy trigger — weathered, hard.
Staging / backgroundhis face large, alley behind.
Light & moodgrey on his face; a breath from disaster, held.
Noteone heartbeat from firing on his own.

FRAME 16SEC 21 Ruins — Korin Recognizes Herimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.

Staging / backgroundhis face large, Stella soft behind.
Light & moodgrey, a softening warmth; the crack of "…Stella? I knew you when you were small — always at your mother's side."
Notethe little girl he knew twenty years ago, surfacing in his eyes (no rendered text).

FRAME 129SEC 27 Parasite — Its True Formimagen fija
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime storyboard frame, cinematic composition, 2D hand-painted Studio Ghibli aesthetic, film-grade lighting, soft grain, painterly detailed background, single still frame, no motion blur. 21:9 aspect ratio.
References to attachImage 1 = @Parasito; Image 2 = @SalaTrono.
Framingextreme wide, high crane angle.
Subjectthe @Parasito in its true form — a colossal pitch-black mass made of countless screaming devoured human faces that surface and sink, a porous black membrane drinking all light, no fixed boundaries, glowing wrong with stolen luzagua light; filling the hall.
Staging / backgroundthe monster occupying the whole throne hall.
Light & moodstolen-light glow swallowed by black; contemplative, apocalyptic awe, held.
Notethe emptiness at Erdia's heart, revealed.

Noteits scale made unbearable from below.

Staging / backgroundthe breach erupting into the hall.
Light & moodblast-light; frozen at peak instant.
Noterescue arriving through the wall.
